sections.description: Vue 3 single-file components for the dashboard UI, organized into layout components, section containers, and sub-directories for charts and heatmaps.
sections.purpose: Provides all visual building blocks for the dashboard: header with controls, error display, summary metric cards, collapsible sections, and container components that compose chart and heatmap sub-components.
strengths: Each component is self-contained with <style module> for scoped CSS
Section containers (CodeActivity, TokenBreakdown, EfficiencyAnalysis) compose chart components into logical groups
CollapsibleSection is a generic wrapper using native <details>/<summary> elements
weaknesses: Some CSS duplication across panel/grid styles in section containers
No loading skeleton states for initial data fetch
sections.test_coverage: No component tests. Components are tested implicitly through manual verification.
sections.functionality:
- DashboardHeader: title, time range <select>, auto-refresh checkbox, last updated timestamp
- ErrorBanner: conditional red banner for fetch errors
- SummaryCards: 7 metric cards (tokens, cost, active time, sessions, commits, PRs, lines changed) with computed sub-text
- CollapsibleSection: generic <details>/<summary> wrapper with title prop and optional open state
- CodeActivity: section container with LanguagesChart, ToolUsageDonut, acceptance rate gauge, LocOverTime
- TokenBreakdown: section container with TokensByModel, CostByModel, token detail table
- EfficiencyAnalysis: section container with cache efficiency gauge, TokenTypePie, CostPer1k, ActivityBySession
sections.files:
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| DashboardHeader.vue | Header with time range selector, auto-refresh toggle, last updated |
| ErrorBanner.vue | Conditional error message display |
| SummaryCards.vue | 7 metric summary cards with computed sub-text |
| CollapsibleSection.vue | Generic <details>/<summary> wrapper |
| CodeActivity.vue | Code activity section: languages, tools, acceptance rate, LoC |
| TokenBreakdown.vue | Token section: by-model chart, cost donut, detail table |
| EfficiencyAnalysis.vue | Efficiency section: cache gauge, token pie, cost/1K, activity by session |
| ActivityTrends/ | Heatmap sub-components (calendar, weekday, hourly) |
| charts/ | Chart.js visualization components |
